title: ranunculus pubescens
intro: Ranunculus pubescens, also known as the downy ranunculus or downy buttercup, is a perennial plant in the family Ranunculaceae, native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating various health issues. The plant is said to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating pain, and promoting wound healing. The herbal preparations of Ranunculus pubescens include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used to make remedies for various health conditions.
